checklist_item.title: Is Bloom returned only after all logs are fully processed?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Review logs_bloom for early return paths. 2. Check for race conditions in log processing. 3. Verify bloom construction completes before return. 4. Test exception handling during log processing.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-37. Early return produces partial bloom.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is receipt bloom consistency with logs verified?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct receipt with bloom inconsistent with logs. 2. Submit block via P2P. 3. Verify bloom is recomputed and compared. 4. Confirm blocks with inconsistent blooms are rejected.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-38, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is cumulative_gas_used monotonically non-decreasing?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with receipts where cumulative_gas_used decreases. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test consecutive receipt pairs for monotonicity validation.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-40, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are logs with more than 4 topics rejected?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Review EVM LOG0-LOG4 opcode handlers. 2. Verify no opcode allows more than 4 topics. 3. Test for bugs in opcode handling that could produce excess topics. 4. Verify topic count validation during transaction execution.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-42, Trust Boundary: tb-003. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are oversized blocks rejected per EIP-7934?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block exceeding EIP-7934 RLP size limit. 2. Verify early rejection before full deserialization. 3. Test boundary at exact size limit. 4. Measure resource consumption for oversized blocks.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-43, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom bit arithmetic spec-compliant across implementations?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify exact formula: bit_to_set = Uint.from_be_bytes(hash[idx:idx+2]) AND 0x07FF. 2. Verify bit_index = 0x07FF - bit_to_set. 3. Verify byte_index = bit_index // 8. 4. Verify bit_value = 1 << (7 - (bit_index % 8)). 5. Cross-check against other client implementations.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-44, Trust Boundary: tb-008. CRITICAL - any deviation causes consensus split.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom computation bounded by gas limits?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Craft transactions maximizing log output within gas limit. 2. Measure bloom computation time. 3. Verify O(n) complexity in total log entries. 4. Confirm gas limits bound computation.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-45, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Conditional scope - known design limitation.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is bloom keccak256 call count bounded?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Count keccak256 calls during max-log block processing. 2. Verify bound: (1 + max_topics_per_log) * max_logs_per_block. 3. Test at EIP-7825 and EIP-7934 limits.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-46, Trust Boundary: tb-008. Conditional scope - bounded by gas.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is gas_used <= gas_limit enforced?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with gas_used > gas_limit. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test at exact boundary (gas_used == gas_limit).
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-49, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is header bloom verified against computed receipt blooms?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with header bloom != combined receipt blooms. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test bloom combination logic across receipts.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-50, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-008. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is parent_hash validated against canonical chain?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with fabricated parent_hash. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block is rejected or deferred. 4. Test with parent_hash of orphaned/non-canonical blocks.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-51, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is timestamp > parent.timestamp enforced?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with timestamp <= parent.timestamp. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test timestamp == parent.timestamp edge case.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-52, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is extra_data limited to 32 bytes?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with extra_data > 32 bytes. 2. Submit via P2P. 3. Verify block rejection. 4. Test at exactly 32 bytes and 33 bytes.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-53, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is block number == parent.number + 1 validated?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct block with incorrect block number. 2. Test number = parent.number (same). 3. Test number = parent.number + 2 (skip). 4. Verify all variants rejected.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-54, Trust Boundary: tb-001. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is state_root verified after full block execution?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Construct valid-looking block with incorrect state_root. 2. Execute all transactions. 3. Verify state_root recomputation. 4. Confirm mismatch causes rejection.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-W7B16-55, Trust Boundary: tb-001. CRITICAL - state_root bypass breaks consensus.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is trie root computation deterministic regardless of insertion order?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Create identical trie states with different insertion orders. 2. Compute root() for each. 3. Verify all roots are identical. 4. Test with large key sets and varied orderings.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0001, Trust Boundary: tb-006. CRITICAL - non-determinism causes network-wide consensus failure.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does patricialize terminate for all valid inputs?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify level parameter strictly increases on each recursive call. 2. Test with keys at maximum nibble length (64 for secured tries). 3. Check for infinite recursion conditions. 4. Test all trie modes (secured and unsecured).
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0002, Trust Boundary: tb-001, tb-008. CRITICAL - infinite recursion halts network.

checklist_item.title: Are default values excluded from trie._data (no ghost entries)?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Set key to non-default value, then set to default. 2. Verify key is removed from _data. 3. Check trie._data.keys() after deletion. 4. Verify no ghost entries in Merkle root computation.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0003. CRITICAL - ghost entries corrupt state root.

checklist_item.title: Does trie_get return the exact value set by trie_set?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Set various key-value pairs. 2. Get each key and verify exact value match. 3. Test with edge case values (empty, large, special characters). 4. Test unset keys return trie.default.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0004. CRITICAL - incorrect reads break EVM execution.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Are secured trie keys always keccak256 hashed?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify _prepare_trie hashes keys when trie.secured=True. 2. Check for code paths bypassing key hashing. 3. Verify no raw keys appear in secured trie mapping. 4. Test for trie-balancing attack vectors.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0005, Trust Boundary: tb-007. Bug bounty eligible.

checklist_item.title: Does encode_node always produce non-empty output?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test encode_node with all value types. 2. Verify assertion for v != b''. 3. Look for edge cases producing empty bytes. 4. Test with unusual Account, Transaction, Receipt values.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0006. Empty encoding crashes or corrupts trie.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is get_storage_root always invoked for Account encoding?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Trace Account encoding path. 2. Verify get_storage_root is called. 3. Test with newly created accounts. 4. Verify None return causes failure (not silent success).
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0007, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - missing storage root corrupts state.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Does get_storage_root return correct canonical roots?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Verify storage root computation for various accounts. 2. Test accounts with empty storage (should return EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT). 3. Compare computed roots against known correct values. 4. Test edge cases triggering callback.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0008, Trust Boundary: tb-002. CRITICAL - incorrect storage root silently corrupts state.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is the 32-byte threshold in encode_internal_node exact?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Test with RLP encoding exactly 31, 32, 33 bytes. 2. Verify < 32 returns unencoded, >= 32 returns hash. 3. Check for off-by-one errors. 4. Cross-reference against Ethereum specification.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0010, Trust Boundary: tb-004, tb-005. CRITICAL - boundary error causes consensus split.

checklist_item.title: Verify Trust Boundary Integrity: Is RLP encoding deterministic and canonical?
checklist_item.test_procedure: 1. Encode same input multiple times. 2. Verify bit-identical output. 3. Test with complex nested structures. 4. Compare against canonical RLP specification.
checklist_item.notes: Source: PROP-0011, Trust Boundary: tb-004. CRITICAL - non-canonical RLP breaks consensus.
